prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024 年历史录取位次（；2025 年物理类最低位次约 5632 名，作为本次预测基准；2025 年物理类计划 19 人；2026 年招生计划文件（enrollment_plan_2026_flat.csv）因数据量过大无法直接提取陕西师范大学在宁夏的条目，专用目录 data/招生人数/宁夏回族自治区/陕西师范大学/ 不存在，故 plan_change 按 0 处理，即计划人数持平。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 陕西师范大学为教育部直属 211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳步上升：2021 年第 71 名→2024 年第 62 名→2025 年第 65 名→2026 年第 63 名，整体处于全国前 65 名区间，办学实力稳定；2024 年声誉评价为偏负面（副教授被举报性骚扰事件），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；但抖音热度总排名第 15 位（高热），手写录取通知书等正面内容广泛传播，整体关注度较高；2021–2025 年无投档线断档记录；中国语言文学 A-、心理学 A-、教育学 A-，共 3 个 A- 学科，在师范类院校中学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度 2023 年较 2022 年小幅降温，2024 年进一步降至 55.84（分化观望），整体趋于平稳；宁夏 2026 年高考总人数约 66000 人（不确定），按 2025 年物理类占比 67.5% 估算约 44550 人，较 2025 年 44491 人微增，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 5632 名、招生计划持平、软科排名微升、抖音高热但声誉有负面事件、考生人数微增等因素，预计 2026 年物理类竞争略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约 5652 名，区间 5152–6152 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 物理学类（含师范、恒元班、创新实验班、电子信息科学与技术）
- 数学类（含师范、国俊班、信息与计算科学、统计学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 化学类（含师范、笃学班、创新实验班、应用化学）
- 经济学类（含经济学、金融学）
- 生物科学类（含师范、理科基地班、哲民实验班、生态学）
- 计算机类（含创新实验班、软件工程、人工智能）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（含材料化学、新能源材料与器件）
- 食品科学与工程类（含食品科学与工程、食品营养与健康）
- 心理学类（含泽如拔尖基地班、应用心理学）
- 地理科学类（含师范、创新实验班、地理信息科学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 5152–6152 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<5152 名）可重点冲击物理学类、数学类等优势专业；位次接近区间上限（>6152 名）建议优先选择三档专业以提高录取概率。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Historical admission rankings from 2021–2024; the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2025 is approximately 5632, used as the baseline for this prediction; the 2025 Physics Category plan has 19 students; the 2026 enrollment plan file (enrollment_plan_2026_flat.csv) cannot directly extract entries for Shaanxi Normal University in Ningxia due to large data volume, and the dedicated directory data/招生人数/宁夏回族自治区/陕西师范大学/ does not exist, so plan_change is treated as 0, meaning the planned number remains unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shaanxi Normal University is a directly affiliated 211 and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education; its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have steadily risen in recent years: 71st in 2021 → 62nd in 2024 → 65th in 2025 → 63rd in 2026, overall within the top 65 nationally, with stable办学 strength; the 2024 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (associate professor reported for sexual harassment incident), which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; however, Douyin popularity ranks 15th overall (high heat), with positive content such as handwritten admission letters widely disseminated, resulting in overall high attention; there were no records of admission cutoff line breaks from 2021–2025; Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, totaling 3 A- disciplines, highlighting strong disciplinary strength among normal universities, which strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors slightly cooled in 2023 compared to 2022, further dropping to 55.84 in 2024 (differentiated观望), overall trending towards stability; the total number of Ningxia Gaokao examinees in 2026 is approximately 66,000 (uncertain), estimated at about 44,550 based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of 67.5%, a slight increase from 44,491 in 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5632, unchanged enrollment plan, slight rise in Soft Science ranking, high Douyin popularity but negative reputation incidents, and slight increase in examinee numbers, it is expected that competition in the 2026 Physics Category will slightly intensify, with rankings shifting slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5652, with a range of 5152–6152.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Physics (including Normal, Hengyuan Class, Innovation Experimental Class, Electronic Information Science and Technology)
- Mathematics (including Normal, Guojun Class, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chemistry (including Normal, Duxue Class, Innovation Experimental Class, Applied Chemistry)
- Economics (including Economics, Finance)
- Biological Sciences (including Normal, Science Base Class, Zheming Experimental Class, Ecology)
- Computer Science (including Innovation Experimental Class, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (including Materials Chemistry, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Food Science and Engineering (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Psychology (including Zeru Top-Notch Base Class, Applied Psychology)
- Geographical Sciences (including Normal, Innovation Experimental Class, Geographic Information Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5152–6152, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<5152), prioritize competitive majors such as Physics and Mathematics; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>6152), it is advisable to choose Tier 3 majors first to increase admission probability.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1009 名、招生计划持平、软科排名稳定、抖音高热但声誉有负面事件、考生人数基本持平等因素，预计 2026 年历史类竞争略加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约 1024 名，区间 840–1208 名。
